Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x800A "SATANSHOLLOW-800A" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Satan's Hollow (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: NOP'd out the JSR calls to $80C8 at $804A and $8074 to remove disk highscore loading and saving. Also zeroed out $64FF - $6543 to initialise the highscore table.
